problem id: ea6859d7
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(2) AND NOT SHR(1)) XOR NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  00011011 -> 00011111
  00111000 -> 00011111
  01000010 -> 11110111
  01001011 -> 01110111
  01101000 -> 01111110
  01000101 -> 01101010
  11110111 -> 11111011
  00101001 -> 11011111
  01110100 -> 00111110

query: 01001101
predicted answer: 01101110
